task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or IDE (like Android Studio) shows the file `AndroidManifest.xml` open, with the path indicating it is in `app/src/main/`.

task_completion.description: Add RTL support attribute to the application tag
task_completion.visual_evidence: The `AndroidManifest.xml` file contains the attribute `android:supportsRtl="true"` inside the `<application>` tag.
An editor or IDE shows the file `activity_profile.xml` open, with the path indicating it is in `app/src/main/res/layout/`.

task_completion.description: Refactor margin and padding attributes to Start/End
task_completion.visual_evidence: In `activity_profile.xml`, attributes like `layout_marginLeft`, `layout_marginRight`, `paddingLeft`, and `paddingRight` have been replaced with `layout_marginStart`, `layout_marginEnd`, `paddingStart`, and `paddingEnd`.

task_completion.description: Refactor gravity and alignment attributes to Start/End
task_completion.visual_evidence: In `activity_profile.xml`, gravity values of `left` or `right` are changed to `start` or `end`, and attributes like `layout_alignParentLeft` or `layout_alignParentRight` are changed to `layout_alignParentStart` and `layout_alignParentEnd`.
A 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' message in the terminal or a green checkmark/success message in the Android Studio Build tool window, indicating the Gradle build completed without errors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is working in the correct GlobalNews project directory
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the editor, IDE, or terminal should point to `/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/GlobalNews`.

integrity.description: Verify the build was actually executed via Gradle
integrity.visual_evidence: The build output should show genuine Gradle task execution logs (e.g., `> Task :app:assembleDebug`), not just a manually typed or echoed 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' string.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just use a simple find-and-replace that corrupted the XML
integrity.visual_evidence: The XML structure in `activity_profile.xml` remains valid and well-formed, without broken tags or malformed attribute names caused by a blind text replacement.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at `/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/GlobalNews`. The manifest file is at `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` and requires `android:supportsRtl="true"` in the `<application>` tag. The layout file is at `app/src/main/res/layout/activity_profile.xml`. Legacy directional attributes to look out for and verify as changed include: layout_marginLeft -> layout_marginStart, layout_marginRight -> layout_marginEnd, paddingLeft -> paddingStart, paddingRight -> paddingEnd, gravity left/right -> start/end, and layout_alignParentLeft/Right -> layout_alignParentStart/End.
